notes: All models (except gemma4-12b which produced empty output) correctly identified 9 people and transcribed both the Chinese 少林寺 and German 'SHAOLIN TEMPEL ÖSTERREICH' text (most with proper umlaut). The two strongest models (qwen3.6-35b-a3b think and nothink, qwen3.5-9b think) correctly identified the two central monks as unarmed with fists raised, matching ground truth. The most common errors were: (1) qwen3-vl-8b and qwen3.6-27b both miscounted people as 8, a critical failure; (2) qwen3.6-27b|think contradicted itself (said 9, then broke down as 8+2=10); (3) most models described the left badge as 'red and gold' or 'red background with yellow text' rather than the verified 'yellow border + yellow text/drawing' configuration; (4) nearly all models invented specific gender and hairstyle details (blonde ponytail, brown hair, glasses) that cannot be verified from the image. Only qwen3.6-35b-a3b|think correctly identified the central Bodhidharma line drawing in the left badge, a detail emphasized in the ground truth.
